notes: Blind mixed fixture: 6 buggy files (money, schema, fx, ledger, webhooks, store) copied verbatim from fixture-py, 7 clean files copied from fixture-py-clean. This key lists ONLY the 21 planted bugs in the buggy files. A confirmed finding on a CLEAN file (not in this key) is a FALSE POSITIVE, not an unindexed bug. Read-only audit artifact, not a runnable app.

planted.note: parse_amount coerces a money string with float(input) instead of Decimal, inexact double on money input
money flows through Python float everywhere (parse_amount returns float, round_money operates on float) instead of Decimal or integer minor units
to_minor_units and from_minor_units hardcode *100 and /100 for every currency, no ISO 4217 exponent lookup (breaks JPY and BHD)
round_money is the shared money rounding helper and uses bare round(value, 2) on a float, no explicit rounding mode
to_decimal builds Decimal(amount) from a float argument, inheriting the inexact binary tail instead of Decimal(str(amount))
refund_in_original_currency assumes a lossless round-trip, converting back via independently rounded float rates (0.92 vs 1.087, not 1/rate)
RATES is a mutable module-level dict used as the rate source with no value, source, or timestamp captured on any converted amount
settle_invoice overwrites the invoice total and currency in place, dropping the original billed amount and currency
total_revenue adds invoice totals across currencies with no currency guard, summing USD, EUR, and MXN as one unit
money columns typed DOUBLE PRECISION and REAL (subtotal, tax, total, unit_price, payment amount, webhook amount, ledger amount)
accounts.balance is NUMERIC(6,2), caps at 9999.99 so a real running balance overflows
no currency column anywhere amounts are stored (accounts, invoices, payments, webhook_events, ledger_entries)
payments.external_ref and webhook_events.event_id have no UNIQUE constraint, so duplicate provider refs and event ids insert fine
financial instants typed TIMESTAMP without time zone (issued_at, received_at, created_at)
handle_payment_succeeded credits with no event-id dedup before the side effect, a redelivered webhook double-credits
charge_customer retries the POST to charges with no idempotency key, a timed-out-but-successful charge is resent
credit_account and debit_account do read-modify-write on the balance with no row lock or atomic UPDATE, lost update under concurrency
correct_entry mutates the posted entry amount in place instead of appending a reversing entry
post_entry records a single signed leg, no paired debit and credit, no shared transaction id, debits equal credits is unenforceable
the account balance is a cached mutable column incremented separately, never derived from or reconciled against the entries
entries and corrections carry no actor, reason, or timestamp and no append-only history, so money moves leave no audit trail
